title: Revenue Recognition with multiple currencies
excerpt: Understand the roles of presentment and settlement currencies in Stripe Revenue Recognition. Two types of currencies are important to recognize revenue: - Presentment currencies: The currencies that your customers use to pay. - Settlement currencies: The currencies that you receive payment. Additionally, you can [choose a functional currency](https://docs.stripe.com/revenue-recognition/revenue-settings.md#functional-currency) in your settings. A functional currency translates all transactions beginning on or after your selected start date to a single currency. For all transactions with presentment currencies matching one of your settlement currencies, Stripe Revenue Recognition processes journal entries in that currency directly.…
